title: Update all friend card paragraphs to warm and playful third-person group tone

requirements.summary: Rewrite all seven friend tribute message paragraphs in friendsData.ts to use a warm and playful third-person collective voice, as if the entire friend group is hyping up each person together
acceptanceCriteria: All seven friend entries in friendsData.ts have their tribute message paragraphs rewritten in third-person collective voice
The tone is warm and playful throughout — not formal or somber
Each paragraph reads as if the whole group is speaking together (e.g., uses 'we', 'us', 'the whole group', 'everyone knows')
No paragraph uses first-person singular ('I') or second-person ('you') voice
Friend names, titles, epithets, and all other fields remain unchanged
The updated text renders correctly on the friend cards and tribute panels

file_operations.description: Rewrite the tribute message field for all seven friend entries to use a warm, playful third-person collective tone (e.g., 'We all know her as...', 'Ask anyone in the group and they'll tell you...', 'She's the one we all turn to when...'). Transform each multi-line tribute paragraph so it reads as if the entire friend group is collectively celebrating and hyping up that person. Preserve all other fields (id, name, title, epithet, animationType, emoji) exactly as they are. Ensure the voice is consistently warm and playful across all entries, avoiding first-person singular or second-person perspective.
